name: skelenest
description: An opinionated CLI for scaffolding NestJS projects

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsup bin/skelenest.ts src/**/*.ts --format cjs --dts && chmod +x dist/bin/skelenest.js && cpx "src/templates/**/*" dist/src/templates && cpx "src/templates/**/.[!.]*" dist/src/templates && cpx "src/templates/**/.*/**/*" dist/src/templates
scripts.release:patch: pnpm release:check && npm version patch && git push origin main --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: pnpm release:check && npm version minor && git push origin main --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: pnpm release:check && npm version major && git push origin main --follow-tags && npm publish

author: Mehmet Konukcu <mehmetext68@gmail.com>
